subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the breaths of God! The month of fasting hath advanced with its formidable hosts and valiant legions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب بنفحات الله قد اقبل الشهر الصیام بجیوشه الجراره و جنوده الکراره
subcodes.subjects: @apocalyptic imagery, @entry by troops, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @law of fasting, @imagery in the Qur'an, @spiritual transformation
